Politics.headline: Trump Announces Naval Blockade of Iran After Islamabad Talks Yield No Deal
Politics.detail: Following unsuccessful talks in Islamabad, President Trump has announced a naval blockade of Iran, escalating tensions in the region. The move comes amidst ongoing disputes over Iran's nuclear program and regional influence.

Politics.headline: Rep. Eric Swalwell to Resign from Congress Over Sexual Assault Allegations
Politics.detail: Democratic Representative Eric Swalwell of California has announced his resignation from Congress after multiple women accused him of sexual misconduct. Swalwell, who denies the charges, has also dropped his bid to become the next governor of California.

Politics.headline: Trump Deletes Post with AI Image of Himself as Jesus-Like Figure After Outcry
Politics.detail: President Trump deleted a post on Truth Social that featured an AI-generated image depicting him as a Jesus-like figure following criticism from evangelical and Catholic allies. The image was deemed blasphemous by some, leading to a rare public break from a base that has largely supported Trump.

Politics.headline: Texas Congressman Tony Gonzales Says He Will Resign From House Seat
Politics.detail: Republican Tony Gonzales will step down from his Texas congressional seat amid a potential expulsion threat. This follows allegations related to an affair with a staffer.

Politics.headline: Judge Dismisses Trump's Lawsuit Against Wall Street Journal Over Epstein Drawing
Politics.detail: A federal judge has dismissed President Trump's lawsuit against the Wall Street Journal, which claimed the newspaper defamed him by publishing a drawing of a naked woman that it alleged Trump contributed to a birthday gift for Jeffrey Epstein. The judge found the claims without merit.

Finance & Economy.headline: Oil prices surge past $103 a barrel after US announces blockade of Iran
Finance & Economy.detail: The conflict between the US and Iran has driven up oil prices, with Brent crude surpassing $103 a barrel following the US announcement of a blockade of Iranian ports, exacerbating concerns about global energy supply.

Finance & Economy.headline: Lazard CEO says global economy is in a 'Road Runner moment'
Finance & Economy.detail: Lazard CEO Peter Orszag stated that the global economy is in a 'Road Runner moment' where the impact of the Middle East conflict on prices is yet to manifest, with supply shocks taking a long time to affect prices.

Finance & Economy.headline: US stocks rally and return to where they were before the US-Iran war
Finance & Economy.detail: U.S. stocks have recovered their losses caused by the U.S.-Iran war, fueled by optimism that the global economy can avoid a worst-case scenario.

Finance & Economy.headline: Gap between richest and poorest Canadians widened again in 2025, StatsCan says
Finance & Economy.detail: Statistics Canada reported that the income gap between the richest and poorest Canadians continued to grow in 2025, with the difference in disposable income share between the top 40% and bottom 40% reaching 46.7 percentage points.

Finance & Economy.headline: India Inflation Rises to 1-Year High
Finance & Economy.detail: The annual inflation rate in India increased to 3.4% in March 2026, marking a one-year high, driven by rising food and fuel prices, despite being slightly below market expectations.

Technology.headline: The votes are in: AI will hurt elections and relationships
Technology.detail: A recent report from Stanford's AI boffins reveals unsafe usage practices and widespread anxiety about AI's impact, also noting that China is catching up to the USA in AI development. The report suggests potential negative consequences of AI on both elections and interpersonal relationships.

Technology.headline: FBI and Indonesian Police Dismantle W3LL Phishing Network Behind $20M Fraud Attempts
Technology.detail: The FBI, in collaboration with Indonesian authorities, shut down a global phishing operation using the W3LL toolkit, which stole account credentials and attempted over $20 million in fraud. Authorities detained the alleged developer and seized key domains associated with the phishing scheme.

Technology.headline: Booking.com warns reservation data may have checked out with intruders
Technology.detail: The travel giant, Booking.com, has issued a warning that reservation data may have been compromised, potentially exposing names, contact details, dates, and hotel messages. This cyber-crime incident highlights the increasing risks associated with online platforms and the protection of user data.

Technology.headline: Notepad sheds Copilot from toolbar as Microsoft gives subtlety a try
Technology.detail: Microsoft is making changes to Notepad, removing Copilot from the toolbar but keeping the AI functionalities accessible under 'Writing Tools'. This adjustment suggests a move towards a more subtle integration of AI within the operating system.

Technology.headline: Can AI revive democracy? Former Amazon product manager builds tool to spark civic engagement
Technology.detail: A former Amazon product manager is developing an AI tool that transforms dense city council agendas and meeting minutes into easy-to-understand briefings. The aim is to encourage greater participation in local government meetings by providing citizens with accessible information.

Science.headline: Simulations reveal cold, dusty reality of galaxy formation
Science.detail: New audio-visual simulations, COLIBRE, show how galaxies formed and evolved from the Big Bang to the present day, revealing that the standard cosmological model can explain the observed growth of galaxies when key physics is included. The simulations include the physical and chemical processes needed to model cold interstellar gas and small dust grains, which greatly influence galactic gas.

Science.headline: New vlog of Shenzhou XXI crew details advanced in-orbit medical experiments
Science.detail: The China Manned Space Agency (CMSA) released a video diary of the Shenzhou XXI astronauts aboard the Tiangong space station, highlighting advanced aerospace medical experiments conducted 160 days into their mission. The astronauts completed blood sample collection for experiments and maintained their health by exercising.

Science.headline: UNSW scientists recognised for medical research, Bengaluru campus update and more – 14 April 2026
Science.detail: UNSW scientists have been recognized for their work in medical research. The article also highlights UNSW's initiatives to address the gender pay gap and promote equity for all staff.

Science.headline: Pattern to Present at Life Science Innovation Northwest 2026
Science.detail: Pattern's Chair and CEO Mark Anderson will present at Life Science Innovation Northwest 2026 on April 22, focusing on the company's Pattern Discovery Engine™ (PDE) and its application to bio research. The PDE uncovers correlations and causations without bias, setting a new standard for trust and performance in AI and scientific innovation.

Science.headline: Artemis II heat shield faces ultimate test
Science.detail: NASA's Artemis II heat shield is about to face its ultimate test as the Orion crew prepares for reentry. A space expert says there are reasons to be confident ahead of today's historic splashdown.

Health.headline: Almost 2bn to be affected by metabolic liver disease by 2050, study suggests
Health.detail: A recent study projects that nearly 2 billion people worldwide will be affected by metabolic liver disease by 2050, highlighting the growing global burden of this condition.

Health.headline: Taking Tylenol during pregnancy has no link to autism, new study finds
Health.detail: A new study has found no link between taking Tylenol (acetaminophen) during pregnancy and an increased risk of autism in children.

Health.headline: New research reveals that obesity affects men and women in surprisingly different ways
Health.detail: Obesity impacts men and women differently, with men more prone to developing harmful abdominal fat and liver stress signs, while women exhibit higher inflammation and cholesterol levels, according to new research.

Health.headline: Scientists have developed a new way to fight gum disease without wiping out the mouth's helpful bacteria—a major shift from traditional treatments.
Health.detail: Researchers have created a novel approach to combat gum disease by selectively targeting harmful microbes, preserving beneficial bacteria, marking a significant departure from conventional treatments.

Health.headline: Libraries are becoming hubs for public health across the U.S.
Health.detail: Libraries across the United States are increasingly serving as public health hubs, offering resources and support to communities.

Sports.headline: Toronto Tempo select UCLA's Kiki Rice with their 1st WNBA draft pick
Sports.detail: Kiki Rice is the Toronto Tempo's first-ever WNBA draft pick; the Tempo selected the UCLA guard sixth overall in the first round Monday, 10 days after adding its first players in the WNBA expansion draft.

Sports.headline: Iran releases assets of women's football team captain in Australia asylum drama
Sports.detail: The assets of Iranian women's football team captain, Zahra Ghanbari, have been released amidst her asylum drama in Australia.

Sports.headline: Anderson stars as Lancashire win thriller against Derbyshire
Sports.detail: Jimmy Anderson's performance was key in Lancashire's thrilling victory against Derbyshire in County Cricket.

Sports.headline: Farke hails Leeds' historic win at Man Utd
Sports.detail: Daniel Farke celebrates Leeds United's historic Premier League victory over Manchester United, marking their first league win at Old Trafford in 45 years.

Sports.headline: From Hamilton to LA: Leger-Walker eyes WNBA draft after historic win
Sports.detail: After a historic win, Leger-Walker, a basketball player from Hamilton, is setting her sights on the WNBA draft.

Entertainment.headline: Hollywood heavyweights 'unequivocally opposed' to mega merger
Entertainment.detail: More than a thousand movie stars, writers, directors and other Hollywood professionals announced their “unequivocal opposition” to the proposed Paramount merger with Warner Bros Discovery in an open letter published today, arguing it would reduce jobs and movies.

Entertainment.headline: Cast of Celebrity Treasure Island 2026 announced
Entertainment.detail: The cast of the upcoming season of Celebrity Treasure Island has been announced, including a veteran radio broadcaster, several sporting legends and a TVNZ sports reporter.

Entertainment.headline: Britney Spears enters rehab after March DUI arrest
Entertainment.detail: Britney Spears has reportedly checked into rehab following her DUI arrest in March.

Entertainment.headline: Karol G at Coachella – electrifying set destined for festival's hall of fame
Entertainment.detail: Karol G's performance at Coachella has been described as an electrifying set, potentially securing its place in the festival's history.

Entertainment.headline: Tom Holland Declares Zendaya 'Looks Amazing' as They Step Out in Paris Amid Marriage Speculation
Entertainment.detail: Tom Holland praised Zendaya's appearance as they were seen in Paris, amidst ongoing speculation about their marriage.

Crime & Justice.headline: Florida teen charged with murder, sexual abuse in stepsister's cruise ship death
Crime & Justice.detail: A 16-year-old boy has been charged with murder and aggravated sexual abuse in Florida in the death of his 18-year-old stepsister on a Carnival Cruise ship; the indictment reveals he is accused of sexually abusing her before killing her during a family vacation in November 2025.

Crime & Justice.headline: Met explores AI to speed up identification of child sexual abuse victims
Crime & Justice.detail: The Metropolitan Police Service is exploring using AI to rapidly grade and triage child sexual abuse imagery to improve safeguarding and reduce officer exposure to traumatic material, as online child sexual abuse and exploitation continues to rise.

Crime & Justice.headline: Prolific Alien Smuggler Extradited from Brazil to Face Charges in the United States
Crime & Justice.detail: A prolific alien smuggler was extradited from Brazil to face charges in the United States.

Crime & Justice.headline: Auckland man charged after repeated laser strikes on police helicopter
Crime & Justice.detail: A West Auckland man has been charged after allegedly carrying out repeated laser strikes on a Police Eagle helicopter overnight, endangering the transport and causing glare and flash blindness to the crew.

Crime & Justice.headline: Former private school teacher convicted for multiple non recent sexual assaults
Crime & Justice.detail: A former private school teacher was convicted on April 13, 2026, for multiple non-recent sexual assaults.

Education.headline: UNSW scientists recognised for medical research, Bengaluru campus update and more – 14 April 2026
Education.detail: The new UNSW campus in Bengaluru is making significant progress, with teams advancing regulatory approvals, workforce recruitment, and establishing systems and operations ahead of the first intake in August, aiming to expand global education offerings and meet the growing demand for high-quality university places in India. A major focus has been on building the foundations of the student experience to ensure a high-quality UNSW experience in Bengaluru.

Education.headline: Teaching AI in prisons is fine, but leave kids alone
Education.detail: A push to introduce AI into classrooms at ever younger ages is underway in Asia, fueled by policymakers' fear of missing out and industry self-interest, but this risks turning a generation of developing minds into guinea pigs. Singapore is introducing AI in the fourth year of primary school, while Beijing has already begun offering AI courses to primary and secondary students; however, a similar plan in South Korea was rolled back after backlash.

Education.headline: NATO, Azerbaijan Boost Defense Education Ties
Education.detail: NATO's Defence Education Enhancement Programme (DEEP) met with Azerbaijan's National Defence University to assess reform efforts and support faculty and curriculum development, as well as aligning English language training with NATO standards. DEEP will also support NCO corps development to enhance interoperability with NATO, following a request from Azerbaijan's Ministry of Defence.

Education.headline: Broward high-schoolers to get more career support with million-dollar grant
Education.detail: Broward County high school students are set to receive increased career support thanks to a million-dollar grant. The grant aims to provide resources and opportunities to help students explore and prepare for future careers.

Education.headline: Madhya Pradesh Board 10th, 12th Result Date 2026: How To Download Marksheet
Education.detail: The Madhya Pradesh Board has announced the result date for the 10th and 12th class exams of 2026, with instructions provided on how to download the marksheet. Students can access their results and download their marksheets following the outlined procedures.

Lifestyle.headline: Legendary Indian singer Asha Bhosle dies aged 92
Lifestyle.detail: Asha Bhosle, a celebrated and influential Indian singer with a career spanning decades, has passed away at the age of 92. She was known for her versatility and extensive discography in Bollywood and beyond.

Lifestyle.headline: What's the best bottled Italian dressing? We ranked 12 top brands
Lifestyle.detail: A review and ranking of 12 popular brands of bottled Italian dressing was conducted to determine the best option. The review likely considered taste, ingredients, and overall quality to provide consumers with recommendations.

Lifestyle.headline: Never throw away old tyres and instead use them in your garden this April
Lifestyle.detail: Old tyres can be repurposed in the garden during April for various uses. This article suggests reasons to keep old tires for gardening projects.

Lifestyle.headline: 'It feels as if I've made a new best friend': my experiment with AI journalling
Lifestyle.detail: An individual documents their experiences and feelings while experimenting with using AI for journaling. The article explores the potential benefits and unique aspects of using AI in personal reflection and self-discovery.

Lifestyle.headline: Bryan Cranston opens up about losing his childhood home after his dad 'Walked out' on their family
Lifestyle.detail: Bryan Cranston shared details about his childhood, including the experience of losing his home after his father left the family. This personal revelation provides insights into the actor's life and background.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: EDITORIAL: Inflation eases amid energy risk
Opinion/Editorial.detail: Taiwan's headline inflation unexpectedly pulled back last month, led by declines in fruit and communications device prices, offsetting gains in fuel, transport and meat prices; the consumer price index (CPI) rose 1.2 percent year-on-year.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Online scams top 7,300 cases in week
Opinion/Editorial.detail: Online scams in Thailand have surged, with over 7,300 cases reported in a single week, highlighting the growing threat of cybercrime in the region.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Hong Kong taxpayers face HK$28 billion Covid bad-loan burden from SMEs
Opinion/Editorial.detail: Hong Kong taxpayers are expected to bear a substantial financial burden of HK$28 billion due to bad loans issued to small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) during the Covid-19 pandemic.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: The Guardian view on the Southport inquiry: buck-passing led to three girls being killed.
Opinion/Editorial.detail: An inquiry into the deaths of three girls in Southport has revealed a culture of buck-passing and systemic failures that contributed to the tragedy.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Orban's defeat shows the Achilles' heel of populist power
Opinion/Editorial.detail: Max Boot analyzes how Viktor Orban's recent defeat in Hungary highlights the vulnerabilities of populist movements.

World.headline: US starts naval blockade of Iranian ports after deadline passes
World.detail: The US military has initiated a blockade across the Gulf of Oman and the Arabian Sea, targeting all vessels traveling to and from Iran, a move experts are calling an act of war. This action follows the failure of marathon talks with Iran to end the war.

World.headline: Premier League soccer player killed in attack on team bus in Ghana
World.detail: Ghanaian winger Dominic Frimpong was killed at the age of 20 in an attack on his team's bus. The incident has sent shockwaves through the football community.

World.headline: Trump claims Iran wants a deal 'very badly' as US blockade begins in Hormuz
World.detail: Despite escalating tensions with the newly implemented blockade, President Trump asserts that Iran is eager to negotiate a deal. This statement comes as the US begins enforcing a naval blockade of Iranian ports.

World.headline: Floods, power outages and hundreds evacuated as Cyclone Vaianu lashes New Zealand's North Island
World.detail: Cyclone Vaianu has brought severe weather to New Zealand's North Island, causing floods, power outages, and the evacuation of hundreds of residents. The storm has disrupted daily life and caused significant damage in affected areas.

World.headline: French court rules cement giant Lafarge guilty of funding Syria 'terrorism'
World.detail: A French court has found cement manufacturer Lafarge guilty of financing terrorism in Syria. The ruling involves a fine for the company and jail terms for executives in a long-running case concerning Lafarge's actions during the Syrian civil war.

Zimbabwe.headline: Civil Servants' New Pay Structure Ranges From US$370 To US$900
Zimbabwe.detail: Zimbabwe has announced a new pay structure for civil servants, with salaries ranging from US$370 to US$900, though specific details are not provided in this snippet.

Zimbabwe.headline: Police Officers Attacked In Brazen Midnight Robbery, Weapons And Vehicle Seized
Zimbabwe.detail: A midnight robbery in Zimbabwe resulted in police officers being attacked, with weapons and a vehicle stolen.

Zimbabwe.headline: Bulawayo Town Clerk Christopher Dube's Contract Extended To 2030
Zimbabwe.detail: Christopher Dube, the Bulawayo Town Clerk, has had his contract extended to 2030.

Zimbabwe.headline: Robbers disarm police, steal rifle and patrol vehicle in Harare attack
Zimbabwe.detail: In a brazen midnight attack in Harare, robbers disarmed police officers, stole a rifle, and made off with a patrol vehicle; the officers were hospitalized due to injuries sustained during the incident.

Zimbabwe.headline: Mnangagwa sacks rights commission chair after constitutional amendment rebuke
Zimbabwe.detail: President Mnangagwa dismissed the chair of the rights commission after they criticized a constitutional amendment; lawyers are claiming this reassignment is unconstitutional.
